allow: Bash(powershell "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_-Force }")
Bash(powershell "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173,5174,5175,5176 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalPort, OwningProcess")
